name: Okta Privileged Accounts Stale (30 days)
description: Detects privileged okta accounts with stale login activity.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.login AS account_name, u.last_login AS last_login FROM okta_users u WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(u.status, '')) IN ('active','enabled','provisioned','onboarded') AND (COALESCE(u.is_admin, false) = true) AND (u.last_login IS NULL OR u.last_login < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL '30 days')
remediation: Review privileged stale accounts immediately; remove excessive privileges or disable unused access.
